ddls:
CREATE TABLE "skills" (
  "skill_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each skill */,
  "skill_name" TEXT /* Name of the skill */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the skill */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of skill (e.g., passive, toggle, buff) */,
  "character_level" INTEGER /* Minimum character level required to acquire the skill */,
  "skill_level" INTEGER /* Level of the skill (e.g., Lv.1, Lv.2, etc.) */,
  "cooldown" INTEGER /* Cooldown time in seconds */,
  "mana_cost" INTEGER /* Mana cost to use the skill */,
  "effect_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the skill's effect in seconds */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the skill is active */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the skill has been deleted or replaced */,
  "effect_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the skill's effect */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("skill_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "skill_dependencies" (
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dependency */,
  "skill_id" INTEGER /* ID of the skill that has a dependency */,
  "required_skill_id" INTEGER /* ID of the required skill */,
  "required_skill_level" INTEGER /* Required level of the required skill */,
  "is_mandatory" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the required skill is mandatory */,
  "dependency_type" TEXT /* Type of dependency (e.g., prerequisite, optional) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_skill_dependencies_skill_id FOREIGN KEY ("skill_id") REFERENCES skills ("skill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_skill_dependencies_required_skill_id FOREIGN KEY ("required_skill_id") REFERENCES skills ("skill_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "characters" (
  "character_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each character */,
  "character_name" TEXT /* Name of the character */,
  "character_level" INTEGER /* Current level of the character */,
  "character_class" TEXT /* Class of the character (e.g., Tyrr Duelist, Tyrr Grand Khavatari) */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player account */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last time the character was played */,
  "total_play_time" INTEGER /* Total time (in minutes) the character has been played */,
  "gold" INTEGER /* Amount of in-game currency the character has */,
  "xp" INTEGER /* Experience points of the character */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("character_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_characters_character_class FOREIGN KEY ("character_class") REFERENCES character_classes ("class_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_skills" (
  "character_skill_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each character skill */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character who acquired the skill */,
  "skill_id" INTEGER /* ID of the skill acquired */,
  "skill_level" INTEGER /* Level of the skill acquired */,
  "equipped" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the skill is equipped and ready to use */,
  "last_used" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last time the skill was used */,
  "next_available" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the skill will be available again (based on cooldown) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("character_skill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_skills_skill_id FOREIGN KEY ("skill_id") REFERENCES skills ("skill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_skills_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_skill_effects" (
  "character_skill_effect_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each effect of a character's skill */,
  "character_skill_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character skill */,
  "effect_type" TEXT /* Type of effect (e.g., buff, debuff, damage) */,
  "effect_value" TEXT /* Value of the effect (e.g., +10% damage, -20% defense) */,
  "effect_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the effect in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("character_skill_effect_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_skill_effects_character_skill_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_skill_id") REFERENCES character_skills ("character_skill_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each character class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the character class */,
  "class_description" TEXT /* Description of the character class */,
  "base_attributes" TEXT /* JSON object containing base attributes (e.g., strength, agility, intelligence) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)
